content.problemStatement: Print **"Learn Coding on CodeChef"** to the console.
content.outputFormat: Print the exact string: Learn Coding on CodeChef

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required constant string.
Same as sample 1; there is no input.
Repeated to illustrate that output is constant.

solution.approach: The task is to output a fixed string. No computation is needed. The program simply prints "Learn Coding on CodeChef" once. A loop over a single test case is used to satisfy the requirement of handling T test cases.
